summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification: Dashboard hero 'Continue Story' and 'Remix' buttons navigation fix verified. All tests passed - buttons now correctly navigate to /app/story-video-studio with projectId (for Continue) or remixFrom state (for Remix) instead of /experience.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js HeroSection 'Continue Story' button: Correctly navigates to /app/story-video-studio?projectId={job_id} for real stories
Dashboard.js HeroSection 'Remix' button: Correctly navigates to /app/story-video-studio with remixFrom state
No /experience navigation found in Dashboard.js (grep returned empty)
3-story integrity test passed: Each story loads with correct character name in SharePromptModal
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. Dashboard hero buttons now correctly navigate to story-video-studio with projectId or remixFrom state. 3-story integrity test passed for: The Painter of Stars (Old Woman), The Crystal Cave (Sage), The Whispering Woods (Finn).

dashboard_hero_continue_story.details: Clicked 'Continue Story' on hero story 'The Painter of Stars' - navigated to /app/story-video-studio?projectId=261430a2-28f5-4c40-bac2-35f8d275fae7

no_experience_navigation.details: grep for '/experience' in Dashboard.js returned empty - no residual navigation to /experience

3_story_integrity_test.details: All 3 stories loaded with correct character names: The Painter of Stars (Old Woman), The Crystal Cave (Sage), The Whispering Woods (Finn)

share_prompt_modal.details: SharePromptModal displays correct character name from current story context

post_gen_buttons.details: Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode buttons found and functional

competitive_comparison.details: Competitive Comparison section found on post-gen page

bug_verification.original_issue: Dashboard hero 'Continue Story' and 'Remix' buttons were navigating to '/experience' instead of loading the actual project
bug_verification.fix_applied: Both buttons now navigate to '/app/story-video-studio?projectId={job_id}' (for Continue) or with remixFrom state (for Remix)
